final_bibliography_strategy.note: The manuscript currently keeps its bibliography inline in paper/main.tex. Phase 4 treats this as the final flattened strategy only if a clean PDF build confirms there is no hidden bibliography dependency.

evidence: paper/main.tex bibliography items baiRenyi and prestRenyi

reviewer_note: The bibliography now covers the cryptographic backbone, the local artifact anchors, and the formal-methods stack named by the manuscript.
submission_blocker: No TeX engine is available in the current environment, so the inline bibliography strategy has not yet been confirmed by a clean PDF build.
